notes: Per ESC-003 (approved 2026-05-14, Approach A): Agent 3 writes {ship_id: 'PROP-NNN' | 'AMD-NNN' | 'ESC-NNN' | '<descriptive-slug>', started_at: ISO8601} at ship-plan-author time. Clears (sets ship_id=null) at ship-close commit. session.team-work.summary emits read this file. Multi-ship sessions are sequential (one ship at a time). Manual emit scripts + aggregator use ship_id from here when present, otherwise carry the prior fallback signal (often empty / unattributed).
